title: Hydraulic fluid leak on panel 14B
description: Hydraulic fluid seeping from fitting near frame station 245. Requires immediate inspection and seal replacement.

title: Fastener torque out of spec on wing root
description: Three fasteners on left wing root assembly measured below minimum torque spec during routine inspection.

title: Corrosion detected on fuselage skin
description: Minor surface corrosion identified on lower fuselage skin panel near drain hole. Area measures 2cm x 3cm.

title: Navigation light inoperative
description: Port navigation light not illuminating during pre-flight check. Bulb and wiring harness to be inspected.

title: Paint delamination on vertical stabilizer
description: Coating delamination observed on leading edge of vertical stabilizer approximately 15cm in length.

title: Avionics bay cooling fan noise
description: Unusual noise from cooling fan in avionics bay during ground run. Fan speed nominal but bearing suspected.

title: Door seal degradation on access panel
description: Rubber seal on left main gear door access panel showing signs of cracking and hardening. Replacement scheduled.

title: Fuel quantity indicator discrepancy
description: Left main fuel tank quantity indicator reads 50lbs less than calculated fuel load. Sensor calibration required.

title: Static port partially obstructed
description: Debris partially obstructing left static port. Cleared during inspection but root cause under investigation.

title: Brake wear indicator at limit
description: Left main gear inboard brake assembly wear indicator at service limit. Brake replacement required before next flight.
